mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verify_code (vid, target, code, type, expire_time, used, createtime) VALUES (#{vid}, #{target}, #{code}, #{type}, #{expireTime}, #{used}, #{createtime})
mapper.update: UPDATE verify_code SET used = 1 WHERE vid = #{vid}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM verify_code WHERE expire_time < NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM verify_code WHERE target = #{target} AND code = #{code} AND type = #{type} AND used = 0 AND expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY createtime DESC LIMIT 1
